details.test: Task 1: Favorite three English commercial voiceover demos under 30s
Task 2: Select higher-rated (or longer) demo and add to project shortlist
Task 3: Add two recent drama showreels to casting list
Task 4: Request quote for 60-second online ad within $600 budget
Task 5: Submit booking request for 2-hour directed remote session
Task 6: Save three advertising-agency testimonials to favorite clients
Task 7: Create project plan with combined services <= 3 hours
Task 8: Subscribe to monthly newsletter with selected interests
